title: Premium 20cm Non-Stick Saucepan with Glass Lid, 3.4L Capacity, Soft Touch Handle, Steam Vent, Induction & All Hob Compatible, Dishwasher Safe, 2.5mm Pressed Aluminium
features: Spacious 3.4L Capacity – Perfect for boiling, simmering, and preparing meals for the whole family, this 20cm saucepan is a versatile kitchen essential.
Superior Non-Stick Surface – Effortless cooking and cleaning with a premium non-stick coating designed for even heat distribution and healthier meals.
Soft-Touch Handle & Steam Vent Lid – Designed for comfort and control, featuring an ergonomic handle and a durable glass lid with a steam vent for efficient cooking.
Compatible with All Hobs – Works with induction, gas, electric, and ceramic hobs, providing versatility for all types of kitchens.
Premium Build & Easy Maintenance – Made from 2.5mm pressed aluminium for durability and performance. Dishwasher safe for hassle-free cleaning.
